body.title: BaseShim.dispatch() + JSONL call-trace logging
body.result: Shipped incidentally in T-shim-output-validation commit 5ebb4016 — BaseShim.dispatch() + JSONL call-trace to datacenter_logs/shim/trace/
body.description:
Retroactive ticket for dispatch() method and _write_shim_trace() added to BaseShim. Routes all tool calls through the shim with JSONL trace logging to datacenter_logs/shim/trace/YYYYMMDD.jsonl; override via UU_SHIM_TRACE_DIR. Shipped as incidental in T-shim-output-validation commit 5ebb4016.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/shim.py
**Completion criteria:** dispatch() routes calls through shim with JSONL trace; already shipped
